textByHash.386fe07c7e0cfe4e44f19f6bf486b42eb3bf03f1: Be patient , geese always move and cause mischief. If not, I know what we can serve for dinner in the pub.
textByHash.4ca4254b9f2f01d89d2434bca91e472b91ca7974: Can't talk too long. I've got to go fast.
textByHash.bf79aa906d242ed8dd8e867288f12ed08b4bffb6: Then how would I check the time?
